apiVersion: v1

  name: 'STIG - Ensure ''Disable Internet Explorer App'' is set to ''Enabled'''

    SELECT 1 FROM mdm_bridge WHERE mdm_command_input = '<SyncBody><Get><CmdID>1</CmdID><Item><Target><LocURI>./Device/Vendor/MSFT/Policy/Config/InternetExplorer/DisableInternetExplorerApp</LocURI></Target></Item></Get></SyncBody>' AND mdm_command_output LIKE '%<enabled/>%';

  resolution: 'To establish the recommended configuration via configuration profiles, set the following Settings Catalog path. Policy\Config\InternetExplorer\DisableInternetExplorerApp'
